title: Tacu Tacu with Beans and Peruvian Salsa
description: A hearty, comforting Peruvian dish made with crispy tacu tacu patties, creamy beans, and a tangy salsa.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add diced tomato and cook for 2-3 minutes, until tender.
Add diced aji amarillo pepper and cook for another minute.
Mix in cooked tacu tacu and red kidney beans.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Form the mixture into patties and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
Serve hot with a dollop of salsa on top.
To make the salsa, combine diced tomato, onion, garlic, and aji amarillo pepper in a bowl.
Squeeze in lime juice and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
